item.name: Authentic Festive Chirashi-zushi
item.description:
Almost identical to normal chirashi-zushi, but with markedly more festivity. This serving is guaranteed authentic...and hopefully fresh.

※Cannot be retrieved once used.
※Can be used up to 10 times.

Meal benefits when used:
Direct Hit Bonus: +4% (Max 10)
VIT Bonus: +5% (Max 12)
Gear Durability Bonus: +3
EXP Bonus: +3%
Duration: 30m
(Duration can be extended to 60m by consuming multiple servings)
